channel.title: Meta on Pieter Belmans
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Pieter Belmans

item.title: Summer school: Quadratic forms and local-global principles
item.description:
There will be an interesting summer school at the University of Antwerp, on quadratic forms and local-global principles. What is relevant to know, and which is not yet on the website (but it's on the poster in our hallway so I guess the information is neither secret nor unconfirmed) is the list of speakers:

  • Asher Auel (Yale)
  • Raman Parimala (Emory)
  • Suresh Venapally (Emory)
  • Karim Johannes Becher (University of Antwerp)
